name: power-apps-code-apps
description: Multi-agent skill for Power Apps Code Apps development — React/TypeScript apps on Power Platform with Dataverse, Azure SQL, SharePoint, Copilot Studio, and more.

skills.name: power-apps-code-apps
skills.description: Orchestrate Power Apps Code Apps development across frontend, backend, infrastructure, business analysis, architecture, and product management.

agents.name: power-apps-code-apps
agents.description: Routes to specialized sub-agents by domain

agents.name: pa-frontend
agents.description: React, TypeScript, Vite, Fluent UI, scaffolding, migration, context API, iframe embedding

agents.name: pa-backend
agents.description: Dataverse, Azure SQL, SharePoint, Copilot Studio, CRUD, OData, metadata

agents.name: pa-infra
agents.description: Deployment, ALM, CSP, App Insights, telemetry, Azure Functions, custom connectors

agents.name: pa-business-analyst
agents.description: Requirements, user stories, data modeling, validation rules, field mapping

agents.name: pa-architect
agents.description: Solution topology, integration patterns, multi-environment strategy, security design

agents.name: pa-product-manager
agents.description: Roadmap, sprint planning, release management, go-live checklists
